entries.name: Angela
entries.text: The right friends will like you for who you are, not for pretending to be someone else.

entries.name: Britney
entries.text: Sometimes teachers are strict because they want the class to improve. Take the lesson from the scolding, not the emotion.

entries.name: Louis
entries.text: One focused hour in class can save three hours of confusion later at home.

entries.name: Brooklyn
entries.text: Comparing scores with everyone can increase pressure. Focus on improving your own performance instead.

entries.name: Chris
entries.text: School days may feel long now, but later you’ll realize these years pass very quickly, so make good memories.

entries.name: Sam
entries.text: One day you’ll look back and realize these fun moments were the highlights of your school life.

entries.name: Robert Frost
entries.text: In school, many people feel like they must know exactly what they want to do in life. It’s completely normal to still be exploring.
